name: ASUS TUF GAMING X870E-PLUS WIFI7 ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4

description: Premium AM5 ATX motherboard with dual PCIe 5.0, Wi-Fi 7, and dual USB4 for high-end gaming and workstations.
